name: io.github.agentra-commerce/xap
description: Agent settlement protocol — discover, negotiate, settle, and verify with XAP.

environmentVariables.description: Operating mode: 'sandbox' (free, no key needed) or 'live' (requires API key)
environmentVariables.name: XAP_MODE

environmentVariables.description: API key for live mode (not needed for sandbox)
environmentVariables.name: XAP_API_KEY
